title: Release 0.3.14 structured installer remediation
acceptanceCriteria: Workspace versions, CHANGELOG.md, and docs/releases/0.3.14.md are aligned at 0.3.14.
The validated source proof bundles for installer-warning-repair and install-problem-solutions both pass task validation on the release branch.
Fresh release verification passes after the version bump.
The release proof bundle is complete and validates successfully.
The branch is committed, pushed, and merged into main.
